case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. HENRY GIOVANNY HERRERA OSORIO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,599.49 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, HENRY GIOVANNY HERRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSORIO, HENRY GIOVANNY HERRERA $1,599.49 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,704.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JAN-04-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, HENRY GIOVANNY HERRERA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HENRY GIOVANNY HERRERA OSORIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
